response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Oral-history project: seven interviews recorded. Transcript review assigned to Mina. Release form pending from Arturo.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Oral-history project: seven interviews recorded. Transcript review assigned to Mina. Release form pending from Arturo."

prompt: Retrieve the oral-history project summary and update the interview count from six to seven. Keep the reviewer and pending release-form note.

tool_results.summary: Oral-history project: six interviews recorded. Transcript review assigned to Mina. Release form pending from Arturo.
